description.ko: 유기적인 아름다움과 기술적 정밀함의 융합으로, 회로와 광섬유로 이루어진 꽃을 시각화합니다.
description.en: A fusion of organic beauty and technological precision, showcasing a flower made of circuitry and fiber optics.

prompt: A hyper-realistic cinematic 3D render of FLORA-9, titled 'The Silicon Orchid.' A futuristic botanical entity with translucent #FFB6C1 pale pink petals embedded with #50C878 emerald micro-circuitry. Glowing #89CFF0 cyan fiber-optic veins pulse rhythmically within the leaves. The plant is rooted in #4A0E4E deep plum data-soil. Shimmering digital pollen floats like glowing pixels in an ethereal atmosphere. Macro photography focus, Unreal Engine 5 style, 8k resolution, bioluminescent digital nature.
